name: jira.issue.search
description: Run a JQL search against Jira Cloud. Returns a paginated array of issues. Use field restrictions to keep response sizes manageable on large queries.

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config containing host (https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

jql.description: JQL query, e.g. "project = ACME AND status = 'In Progress' ORDER BY updated DESC".

fields.description: Restrict the fields returned, e.g. ['summary','status','assignee']. Omit for all.

total.description: Total matching issues across all pages.
